Income.title: Income
Income.description: Represents a single income record for the clinic.

id.description: Unique identifier for the income record.

source.description: Source of the income (e.g., patient payment, insurance reimbursement).

description.description: Additional details or notes about the income.

Expense.title: Expense
Expense.description: Represents a single expense record for the clinic.

id.description: Unique identifier for the expense record.

vendor.description: Name of the vendor the expense was paid to.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Represents a category for classifying income and expenses.

Budget.title: Budget
Budget.description: Represents a budget set for a specific category within a defined period.

startDate.description: The start date of the budget period.

endDate.description: The end date of the budget period.

amount.description: The budgeted amount for the specified category and period.

alertThreshold.description: Percentage of budget that will trigger an alert (e.g., 0.8 for 80%).

definition.description: Stores income records for a specific user. Path-based ownership ensures only the user can access their income records.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: incomeId
params.description: The unique identifier of the income record.

definition.description: Stores expense records for a specific user. Path-based ownership ensures only the user can access their expense records.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: expenseId
params.description: The unique identifier of the expense record.

definition.description: Stores categories for income and expenses for a specific user. Path-based ownership ensures only the user can access their categories.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: categoryId
params.description: The unique identifier of the category.

definition.description: Stores budget records for a specific user. Path-based ownership ensures only the user can access their budget records.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: budgetId
params.description: The unique identifier of the budget.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to manage financial data for the ClinicFlow application, focusing on income, expenses, categories, and budgets. It follows the principle of path-based ownership for user-specific data and leverages structural segregation to ensure consistent security rules across collections. All data is scoped to the user's ID, ensuring only the authenticated user can access their own financial records.

Authorization Independence is achieved because access control is based on the `userId` parameter within the path, without relying on `get()` calls to parent documents for authorization. Each document is implicitly authorized by its location under the user's node. This simplifies security rules and enables atomic operations.

QAPs (Rules are not Filters) is supported by structurally segregating data by user, and enforcing that all documents under a specific user path conform to the associated security policies. List operations will only return data associated to a user, without filtering.
